_comment: Topic queue for the weekly content cron. scripts/generate-lesson.mjs pops topics[0], generates a Lesson JSON for it (and ~10 themed vocab words), opens a PR. Edit/reorder freely. When this list is empty, the workflow opens an issue asking for more topics instead of improvising.

topics.title: At the Chai Stall
topics.scenario: You're at a roadside chai stall ordering chai and snacks, chatting with the vendor and other regulars

topics.title: Train Travel
topics.scenario: Booking a train ticket and asking about platform numbers, seat availability, and arrival times

topics.title: Complaining About Food
topics.scenario: The food at a restaurant is cold or wrong, you need to send it back politely

topics.title: Discussing a Bollywood Film
topics.scenario: Talking with a friend about the Bollywood movie you both just watched, likes, dislikes, favorite scenes

topics.title: First-Round Job Interview
topics.scenario: An informal first-round interview in Hindi, introducing yourself, talking about experience and motivation

topics.title: Wedding Small Talk
topics.scenario: You're a guest at an Indian wedding, making small talk with relatives you've never met, complimenting the food and decor

topics.title: Lost Wallet
topics.scenario: You realize your wallet is missing, describe where you last saw it, ask shopkeepers if anyone turned it in, report it to a guard

topics.title: Borrowing Money from a Friend
topics.scenario: Asking a close friend to lend you some cash until next week, explaining why, promising to return it

topics.title: Wifi Not Working
topics.scenario: The wifi is down at home, you're calling the ISP support number trying to get it fixed in Hindi

topics.title: At the Pharmacy
topics.scenario: Buying over-the-counter medicine, describing symptoms, asking about side effects and dosage

topics.title: Flirting Cautiously
topics.scenario: A coffee shop chat with someone you're interested in, feeling out the vibe, dropping hints, asking for their number

topics.title: Chatting with an Uncle
topics.scenario: You're at a family gathering and an older uncle wants to discuss your life plans, marriage, and career

topics.title: At the Sabzi Market
topics.scenario: Buying vegetables at a local sabzi market, bargaining, asking what's fresh, choosing quantities

topics.title: Apologizing for Being Late
topics.scenario: You're 30 minutes late to meet a friend, apologize, explain (honestly or not), make it up to them

topics.title: Hostel Check-in
topics.scenario: Checking into a hostel, asking about room availability, prices, amenities, check-out time

topics.title: Discussing the Weather
topics.scenario: Stuck waiting for a delayed bus, small talk with a stranger about the heat, the rains, the season

topics.title: Temple Visit
topics.scenario: First-time visit to a temple, asking about etiquette, what to do, what not to do

topics.title: Office Banter
topics.scenario: Lunch break chat with coworkers, gossip, joking, weekend plans, complaints about meetings

topics.title: Talking to a Child
topics.scenario: Babysitting or playing with a friend's child, simple instructions, encouragement, settling small fights

topics.title: Saying No Politely
topics.scenario: Declining invitations, requests, or offers without offending, the Indian art of soft refusals

topics.title: Chatting at the Gym
topics.scenario: Casual chat between sets at a gym, asking about machines, sharing tips, complimenting workouts

topics.title: Cab Conversation
topics.scenario: Long Uber/Ola ride, small talk with a chatty driver about politics, cricket, family, the route

topics.title: Tech Support Call
topics.scenario: Calling a Hindi-speaking tech support agent, describing a problem, following instructions over the phone

topics.title: Playing Holi
topics.scenario: Out on the streets during Holi, exchanging greetings, dodging color, accepting bhang or sweets

topics.title: Diwali Visits
topics.scenario: Visiting relatives during Diwali, exchanging greetings, accepting sweets, complimenting decorations and clothes

topics.title: Cricket Match Banter
topics.scenario: Watching an IPL match with friends, celebrating shots, criticizing the bowling, debating who's the best player

topics.title: Getting a Haircut
topics.scenario: At a salon describing the haircut you want, length, style, what to avoid, reacting to the result
